findings.location: s1 — HTTPアクセスログの出力例 (source section)
findings.description: The actual log output example (the code block showing all 4 log entry types: BEGIN, PARAMETERS, DISPATCHING CLASS, and END) is completely omitted from the knowledge file. This example demonstrates: the full format of each log entry, how masked passwords appear as ######## in the output, the structure of the PARAMETERS block including nablarch_token, and how all placeholders render in a real-world scenario. This is decision-necessary information for understanding log output format and verifying masking behavior.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains a code block starting with `2011-03-03 19:35:47.848 -INFO- ACC [201103031935478480009] @@@@ BEGIN @@@@` through the END entry with start_time/end_time/execution_time/max_memory/free_memory fields.

findings.description: The source file contains 2 distinct h2-level sections ('リクエスト処理終了時のログ出力に使用するフォーマット' with --- underline, and 'HTTPアクセスログの出力例' with === underline), but the knowledge file merges both into a single section s1. The second section's content is partially included inline under s1 but without its own section entry.
